title: Longitudinal multi-omic profiling uncovers immune escape and predictors of response in multiple myeloma
author: Ohlstrom, Denis
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains the R Seurat object for CD138 negative single cell RNA sequencing data associated with our study titled "Longitudinal multi-omic profiling uncovers immune escape and predictors of response in multiple myeloma ".  
 Single cell data contained within this object comes from MMRF Immune Atlas Consortium work.
steps_raw:
This repository contains the R Seurat object for CD138 negative single cell RNA sequencing data associated with our study titled "Longitudinal multi-omic profiling uncovers immune escape and predictors of response in multiple myeloma ".  
 Single cell data contained within this object comes from MMRF Immune Atlas Consortium work.
